title: Low Pay Commission Report 2024
body: "The Low Pay Commission’s annual report contains the evidence and analysis which underpin Commissioners’ recommendations to the Government of minimum wage rates for 2024.  The LPC submitted its recommendations to the Government in October 2024. They were accepted in full and announced in the Autumn Budget. The rates which will come into force from 1 April 2025 are as follows.     NMW Rate Increase (£) Percentage increase      National Living Wage (21 and over) £12.21 £0.77 6.7   18-20 Year Old Rate £10.00 £1.40 16.3   16-17 Year Old Rate £7.55 £1.15 18.0   Apprentice Rate £7.55 £1.15 18.0   Accommodation Offset £10.66 £0.67 6.7     We have also published final reports from research projects we commissioned to inform this report. "
